message:
fix: resolve relative export paths from workspace root, not cwd

When using --repo-path with workspace discovery, relative export paths
in --export-md and --export-pages now resolve from the workspace root
directory instead of the current working directory. This ensures
predictable and consistent behavior regardless of where the command
is invoked.

Changes:
- Extract path resolution into dedicated resolve_export_path() function
  that resolves relative paths against the project directory
- Pass resolved path through the hook execution pipeline so hooks see
  the correct absolute path via BV_EXPORT_PATH environment variable
- Update export_fn closure signature to receive resolved_export_path
  parameter instead of resolving inline
- Refactor all three export call sites (pages, watch/interactive,
  refresh/sync) to use new path resolution semantics

Tests:
- Add export_md integration test verifying workspace-relative resolution
  when --repo-path discovers a workspace
- Add export_pages integration test with same verification
- Both tests confirm files are written to workspace root and hooks
  receive correct absolute BV_EXPORT_PATH values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
